column8: It was Sunday morning. James_____________a book about insects when his elder sister Beth came into the room. (READ)
column9: Beth____________James and said, "Oh, James, do you know where my jacket is? I can't find it." (SEE)
column10: She thought she had left it_____________in the wardrobe in her room, butwhen she looked, it wasn't there. (HANG)
column11: James decided to play a little game with Beth. "I_____________you if you agree to answer this question," he said. (TELL)
column12: Beth was annoyed and she_____________like playing games, but she agreed anyway, and asked what the question was. (NOT FEEL)
column13: Smiling James asked her how many__________a centipede has. (FOOT)
column14: "Oh, you mean_____________long scary insects that I hate," Beth said. "I don't know how many they have. Is it 100?" she guessed. (THAT)
column15: "The answer is none - they've only got legs! And they've got between 20 and 300 so even if you___________100 legs, you would have been wrong," James told her. (SAY)
column16: Beth told James that that was the___________thing she'd ever heard. "Now, tell me where my jacket is!" said Beth. (SILLY)
column17: The Imperial Academy of Arts is in St Petersburg, Russia. Since it opened, its tutors____________many great artists. (TEACH)
column18: It____________in 1757 by the Russian Minister of Education at the time, Ivan Shuvalov. (CREATE)
column19: The building _____________is grand and beautiful. It was built in the classical style and is on the banks of the Neva River. (IT)
column20: In its early years, if students wanted to have successful ___________as artists, they had to attend this school. (LIFE)
column21: Back then, the_____________students at the Academy often travelled to Europe to study different styles of art. (GOOD)
column22: The Academy ______________to have a great deal of art, but now most of it has been moved to the Hermitage Museum in St Petersburg. (USE)
column23: Officials______________it a few times since 1757. Officially, it is now known as the Ilya Repin St Petersburg State Academic Institute for Painting, Sculpture and Architecture. (RENAME)
column24: Ilya Repin is one of Russia's greatest artists. He_________to the Imperial Academy of Arts in the 1870s. (GO)
column25: His____________work is the painting Ivan the Terrible and His Son. (FAMOUS)
